item.title: Bronco Prepped for the Next Garage Build
item.description: Bronco is getting ready for the ride ahead as the build moves forward. A straightforward look at the prep and mechanical work involved. What changes are next?

media:content.media:title: Bronco Prepped for the Next Garage Build
media:content.media:description: Bronco is getting ready for the ride ahead as the build moves forward. A straightforward look at the prep and mechanical work involved. What changes are next?

item.title: How To Paint Distressed Lettering on a Vintage Truck
item.description: A hands-on look at painting distressed lettering on a vintage truck, with a focus on the prep and finish work behind the makeover. What details would you add?

media:content.media:title: How To Paint Distressed Lettering on a Vintage Truck
media:content.media:description: A hands-on look at painting distressed lettering on a vintage truck, with a focus on the prep and finish work behind the makeover. What details would you add?

item.title: Classic Land Rover Transformation
item.description: A look at the transformation of this classic Land Rover, focusing on the build process and mechanical work involved. What changes stand out most?

media:content.media:title: Classic Land Rover Transformation
media:content.media:description: A look at the transformation of this classic Land Rover, focusing on the build process and mechanical work involved. What changes stand out most?

item.title: Ram Recharger Chassis Update and Next Steps
item.description: A progress update on the chassis work for a Ram Recharger project, covering fabrication, fitment checks, and upcoming build stages. The video highlights workshop planning and structural development. What stage of a build do you think matters most for long-term durability?

media:content.media:title: Ram Recharger Chassis Update and Next Steps
media:content.media:description: A progress update on the chassis work for a Ram Recharger project, covering fabrication, fitment checks, and upcoming build stages. The video highlights workshop planning and structural development. What stage of a build do you think matters most for long-term durability?

item.title: Diesel Valve Lash Step by Step Tutorial
item.description: A clear walkthrough of how to set valve lash on a diesel engine, covering measurements, adjustments, and proper sequencing. The video focuses on precision and correct maintenance procedure. What part of engine tuning do you find most technical?

media:content.media:title: Diesel Valve Lash Step by Step Tutorial
media:content.media:description: A clear walkthrough of how to set valve lash on a diesel engine, covering measurements, adjustments, and proper sequencing. The video focuses on precision and correct maintenance procedure. What part of engine tuning do you find most technical?

item.title: Perfecting Engine Swaps From Fuel to Wiring!
item.description: A look at the engine swap process from fuel system setup to wiring work, with a focus on the mechanical details that make the build come together. What part of the swap takes the most planning?

media:content.media:title: Perfecting Engine Swaps From Fuel to Wiring!
media:content.media:description: A look at the engine swap process from fuel system setup to wiring work, with a focus on the mechanical details that make the build come together. What part of the swap takes the most planning?

item.title: Old Varnished Gas and Fuel System Checks
item.description: A look at old varnished gas and the kind of fuel system issues it can cause during garage work and project car troubleshooting. Have you run into stale fuel before?

media:content.media:title: Old Varnished Gas and Fuel System Checks
media:content.media:description: A look at old varnished gas and the kind of fuel system issues it can cause during garage work and project car troubleshooting. Have you run into stale fuel before?

item.title: LS Engine With Quad Turbo Test
item.description: A high-performance experiment testing an LS engine equipped with four turbochargers. The video focuses on power, tuning, and engineering challenges. How much power do you think this setup can make?

media:content.media:title: LS Engine With Quad Turbo Test
media:content.media:description: A high-performance experiment testing an LS engine equipped with four turbochargers. The video focuses on power, tuning, and engineering challenges. How much power do you think this setup can make?

item.title: How to Bend Steel
item.description: A fabrication-focused video demonstrating techniques used to bend and shape steel for custom builds. The video highlights hands-on metalwork. What fabrication skill is the most impressive to you?

media:content.media:title: How to Bend Steel
media:content.media:description: A fabrication-focused video demonstrating techniques used to bend and shape steel for custom builds. The video highlights hands-on metalwork. What fabrication skill is the most impressive to you?

item.title: Rare 1961 McCulloch Boat Discovery
item.description: A rare discovery of a vintage 1961 McCulloch boat, highlighting its condition and historical value. The video explores restoration potential and unique design. What makes rare finds like this so special?

media:content.media:title: Rare 1961 McCulloch Boat Discovery
media:content.media:description: A rare discovery of a vintage 1961 McCulloch boat, highlighting its condition and historical value. The video explores restoration potential and unique design. What makes rare finds like this so special?

item.title: Coyote-Swapped Bronco Build
item.description: A custom build featuring a Coyote engine swap into a Bronco platform. The video covers fabrication, installation, and performance upgrades. What’s your favorite engine swap combination?

media:content.media:title: Coyote-Swapped Bronco Build
media:content.media:description: A custom build featuring a Coyote engine swap into a Bronco platform. The video covers fabrication, installation, and performance upgrades. What’s your favorite engine swap combination?

item.title: Customizing a Twin Turbo Duramax
item.description: A performance-focused build featuring a custom twin-turbo setup on a Duramax engine. The video highlights fabrication, tuning, and testing. What makes turbo builds so exciting to watch?

media:content.media:title: Customizing a Twin Turbo Duramax
media:content.media:description: A performance-focused build featuring a custom twin-turbo setup on a Duramax engine. The video highlights fabrication, tuning, and testing. What makes turbo builds so exciting to watch?

item.title: A Million-Miler Story
item.description: A story centered around a high-mileage engine that has surpassed one million miles. The video explores maintenance history and mechanical durability. What helps engines last this long?

media:content.media:title: A Million-Miler Story
media:content.media:description: A story centered around a high-mileage engine that has surpassed one million miles. The video explores maintenance history and mechanical durability. What helps engines last this long?

item.title: Burnout Spotlight
item.description: A performance-focused moment showcasing a vehicle doing a controlled burnout. The video highlights power, sound, and reaction. What makes burnouts so popular to watch?

media:content.media:title: Burnout Spotlight
media:content.media:description: A performance-focused moment showcasing a vehicle doing a controlled burnout. The video highlights power, sound, and reaction. What makes burnouts so popular to watch?

item.title: We Have to Start It
item.description: A critical moment where an engine or project vehicle is started after significant repairs or modifications. The video captures testing and initial results. What’s the most nerve-wracking part of a first start?

media:content.media:title: We Have to Start It
media:content.media:description: A critical moment where an engine or project vehicle is started after significant repairs or modifications. The video captures testing and initial results. What’s the most nerve-wracking part of a first start?
